-- ⚠ Ranger policy targets database=* (all schemas in the cluster).
-- UC equivalent is a catalog-level grant on `main`.
-- Only USE CATALOG, CREATE SCHEMA, and ALL PRIVILEGES are valid at catalog level.
-- Other privileges (SELECT, MODIFY, etc.) must be granted per-schema or per-table.
GRANT USE CATALOG ON CATALOG `main` TO `public`;
GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON CATALOG `main` TO `public`;

-- ⚠ Ranger policy targets database=* (all schemas in the cluster).
-- UC equivalent is a catalog-level grant on `main`.
-- Only USE CATALOG, CREATE SCHEMA, and ALL PRIVILEGES are valid at catalog level.
-- Other privileges (SELECT, MODIFY, etc.) must be granted per-schema or per-table.
GRANT USE CATALOG ON CATALOG `main` TO `hive@company.com`;
GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON CATALOG `main` TO `hive@company.com`;

-- Column Mask: Full redaction for user1@company.com
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION `main`.`employee`.mask_personal_ssn_user1_company_com(val STRING)
RETURNS STRING
RETURN IF(
  current_user() = 'user1@company.com',
  '***REDACTED***',
  val
);

ALTER TABLE `main`.`employee`.`personal`
ALTER COLUMN ssn SET MASK `main`.`employee`.mask_personal_ssn_user1_company_com;
